description: Launched all 4 Astro sites with WordPress content migrated
reason: Replace legacy WordPress sites with fast static Astro sites for better Core Web Vitals and SEO
expectedImpact: Initial Google crawling and indexing of all pages

description: Added blog templates, OG images, custom 404 pages, and real founder photo
reason: Improve E-E-A-T signals and social sharing appearance
expectedImpact: Better CTR from social shares, improved E-E-A-T

description: Added breadcrumbs, sitemaps, and tag pages across all sites
reason: Fix crawlability issues and provide Google with proper site structure
expectedImpact: Better indexing, richer search results with breadcrumbs

description: Fixed FAQPage, CollectionPage, breadcrumb schemas; shortened titles/descriptions to spec
reason: Resolve 172 SEO issues flagged in audit - schemas incorrect, titles too long
expectedImpact: Fewer GSC errors, potential rich results for FAQ pages

description: Consolidated blog tags from 79 down to 15 strategic categories
reason: Too many thin tag pages diluting crawl budget and causing duplicate content
expectedImpact: Fewer indexed thin pages, stronger tag page authority

description: Added cookie consent banner with conditional GA4 loading (GDPR compliant)
reason: Comply with GDPR and start collecting engagement data for SEO decisions
expectedImpact: Clean GA4 data for bounce rate / engagement analysis

description: Comprehensive performance optimizations - target 90+ PageSpeed scores
reason: Core Web Vitals are a Google ranking signal; poor performance hurts CTR and conversions
expectedImpact: Improved CWV scores, potential rankings boost

description: Fixed robots.txt and sitemaps on all 4 sites; fixed SSL on mydriveschool.software
reason: Broken robots.txt and sitemaps blocking proper crawling
expectedImpact: Better crawl coverage, correct sitemap discovery

description: Added 107+ automated internal pillar links to blog posts across all sites (299 total links)
reason: Only 39% of planned internal linking was in place - pillar pages not getting enough link equity
expectedImpact: 61% reduction in missing internal links, improved pillar page authority

description: Added revenue calculators to all 4 sites with UTM tracking and cross-site links
reason: Increase on-site engagement and provide a conversion touchpoint for the SaaS products
expectedImpact: Lower bounce rate, increased time on site, lead generation

description: Added SoftwareApplication schema and UTM tracking to all calculator pages
reason: Help Google understand the products; track traffic sources accurately
expectedImpact: Potential rich results for software products in SERPs

description: Phase 1: Comprehensive SEO improvements - Organization schema, meta descriptions, robots.txt
reason: Baseline audit found missing/incomplete schema, generic meta descriptions, and technical issues
expectedImpact: Better SERP appearance, correct schema recognition

description: Phase 2: Consolidated 5 karate belt articles into 1 guide (4,113 words) and merged 2 martial arts type articles
reason: Keyword cannibalization - multiple thin articles competing for same queries
expectedImpact: Eliminate cannibalization, single authoritative page per topic ranks higher

description: Phase 3: Added descriptive alt text to blog images across all sites
reason: Most images had empty or generic alt text - missing image SEO signal
expectedImpact: Image search visibility, improved accessibility

description: Phase 4: Rewrote 16 blog post meta descriptions using [Benefit] + [Data] + [CTA] formula
reason: CTR across all sites critically low (0.05-0.33%) - generic descriptions not compelling
expectedImpact: 10-20% CTR improvement from existing impressions

description: Phase 5: Added 6 contextual internal links across all sites
reason: Key pillar pages not getting enough contextual link support from related posts
expectedImpact: Improved topical authority and pillar page rankings

description: Rewrote PetCare homepage and key pages with honest feature positioning
reason: Original copy made claims about features not yet built - needed to reflect actual MVP honestly
expectedImpact: Better conversion from visitors who understand the real product

description: Updated marketing site to reflect actual app features with optimised screenshots
reason: Site content didn't accurately represent the real product - misalignment with app
expectedImpact: Better qualified visitors, improved conversion from search traffic

description: Added Founding Member early access programme page with Formspree form (survey = 3 months free, call = 6 months + 50% off)
reason: Need to capture early users for the SaaS product before full launch
expectedImpact: Lead capture from search traffic, early user signups

description: Fixed all 4 broken sitemaps in Google Search Console - submitted sitemap-index.xml
reason: PetCare using stale WordPress sitemap (only 2 pages indexed); other 3 sites had wrong filename (sitemap_index.xml with underscore = 404)
expectedImpact: Major - PetCare should see large impressions increase as Google discovers 69 previously invisible pages

description: Added DVSA 27 Driving Skills content cluster (Phases 1-6), localised homepage for UK ADI audience, added blog featured banner
reason: Target the 27 DVSA driving skills keywords - high-intent searches from UK driving instructors
expectedImpact: New keyword cluster targeting UK-specific high-volume searches
